ops.body: 2026-07-16: re-ground the E10.B warrant audit on the clean-slate eval frame (plan Part 0/T1 wipes ~/.cc-steer/eval/ and refreezes from the clean dataset — eval-v2 and its 27 empty-context rows are gone). The audit's stratification and the S-a/S-b decisions should sample from the new frame; its output feeds C3's judged promotion gate (disagreement-fire golden packet + helpful-coverage), which uses athome Judge/GoldenGate machinery per the approved adoption plan.
